headcount_quote: At September 28, 2025, we had approximately 52,000 full-time, part-time and temporary workers, the overwhelming majority of which were full-time employees.
research_notes: FY2025 10-K (fiscal year ended September 28, 2025), accession 0000804328-25-000085, filed November 5, 2025. ~52,000 workers across 200+ locations in 38 countries; voluntary turnover ~6% in FY2025 (up from ~49,000 in FY2024). Human Capital section states 'the substantial majority of our employees work in engineering or technical roles' — qualitative language only, NO numeric or percentage breakdown by function (hardware, software, sales, G&A). Roles array empty per real-filings-only policy; qualitative 'substantial majority in engineering/technical' does not provide sufficient numeric data for role injection.
